description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with an L-shaped configuration, designed to accommodate multiple people comfortably. The sofa features a uniform, deep black upholstery that appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. The seat and back cushions are arranged in a modular, grid-like fashion, each cushion being square and of equal size, giving the sofa a clean and contemporary look. The armrests are present on both ends of the L-shape, matching the height of the backrest and maintaining a boxy, straight profile. The sofa sits low to the ground, and the legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed leg design. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as public lounges, waiting areas, or modern parks.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa with deep black, smooth upholstery and a modular, boxy design. It features uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and a low, contemporary profile.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, both armrests, and the modular arrangement of seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of one section and the straight, boxy armrest at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniformity of the cushion arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the other armrest and the depth of the seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Nine square seat cushions and nine matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged in a modular L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Boxy, straight armrests present at both ends of the L-shape, matching the height of the backrest, with no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure, likely integrated beneath the sofa for a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, segmented visually by the individual back cushions, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
